subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! The ocean of divine knowledge hath appeared before the faces of religions, and from its waves the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من و فرزند کنیز من دریای عرفان امام وجوه ادیان ظاهر و از امواجش کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @presence of; reunion with God
